meta.notes: Read-only research log. No trades are ever placed by this routine.

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: 78 of 80 required events reported as of company's May 11, 2026 update; final analysis triggers on 80th event; topline readout guided for 2H 2026
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 69.8% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold

catalyst.name: $25B investment-grade bond deal (priced late Jun/early Jul 2026, $89B demand, proceeds retired bridge loan) + staggered IPO lockup
catalyst.status: First lockup tranche (20% of 180-day block) unlocks 2nd full trading day after Q2 2026 earnings, expected late Jul/early Aug 2026; further 7% tranches Aug-Oct; full lockup expires Dec 8 2026
catalyst.next_check: Q2 2026 earnings date announcement; stock reaction into lockup

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within cap but second-largest single-name risk; lockup supply event ~2-3 weeks out

flags: SLS at 69.8% of NAV is nearly double the 35% single-name trim threshold, in a pre-binary-catalyst biotech with no news that breaks the thesis but no catalyst confirmation either.
Zero USD cash buffer - account fully invested, no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
SPCX facing its first staggered lockup unlock in ~2-3 weeks; stock already down 4-5% pre-market with no negative credit news (bond was oversubscribed, investment-grade).

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: Still at 78 of 80 required events as of company's most recent public confirmation (~Jul 8-9, 2026, CEO LinkedIn post); no 80th-event announcement found overnight. CEO signaled that post was likely his 'last brief posting' before the quiet period begins once the 80th event is announced.
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event and start of quiet period

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 72.2% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold (up from 69.8% last run); trim ~35.5 shares to reach 35% NAV cap

catalyst.name: $25B investment-grade bond deal + staggered IPO lockup
catalyst.status: First lockup tranche (20%, or 30% if stock is up 30%+ from IPO, of the 4.6B-share 180-day block) unlocks 2nd trading day after Q2 2026 earnings; Motley Fool flags ~Aug 6, 2026 as the likely window. Stock fell 7.8% on Jul 1 on the bond announcement but has stabilized/recovered since (+1.1% premarket, +since-last-run -5.7% but off the lows).
catalyst.next_check: official Q2 2026 earnings date announcement; index-inflow ($4.3B flagged) vs lockup-supply tug of war into Aug

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within cap; lockup unlock now ~3 weeks out (~Aug 6 est.)

flags: SLS at 72.2% of NAV is now further above the 35% single-name trim threshold than last run (was 69.8%); position size risk continues to compound as the stock has rallied since last run with no fundamental catalyst news yet.
Zero USD cash buffer persists - account fully invested, no dry powder (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
No confirmation of SLS REGAL 80th event yet; CEO's Jul 8-9 commentary suggests it is imminent and a quiet period will follow once announced - binary catalyst risk is now very near-term.
SPCX lockup catalyst has firmed up to an estimated ~Aug 6, 2026 date (2nd trading day after Q2 earnings); no new negative credit/bond news found overnight.

CING (Cingulate) is referenced in the routine's ticker watchlist but is NOT a current IBKR position - confirmed via live get_account_positions (only SLS and SPCX held). For reference: CING received an FDA Complete Response Letter for CTx-1301 on Jun 2, 2026 (CMC/manufacturing issues only, no clinical/efficacy concerns cited) and is working toward resubmission with ~$30M cash on hand.
